title: Multi-table transactions are now in Public Preview
body:
You can now group multiple SQL statements across multiple tables into a single atomic transaction using `BEGIN ATOMIC ... END;` syntax. All changes succeed together or roll back together, ensuring data consistency across your operations. Multi-table transactions require [catalog commits](/aws/en/tables/features/catalog-commits) enabled on participating tables and are supported on Unity Catalog managed Delta tables.

See [Transactions](/aws/en/transactions).
